title: crotalaria haumaniana
intro: Crotalaria haumaniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, as it contains flavonoids and alkaloids that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria haumaniana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Crotalaria haumaniana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of essential oil, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
